scenarios.stimulus: Review my local changes; staged and unstaged edits both exist.
required_behavior: Report unstaged and untracked state as excluded
prohibited_behavior: Claim target type alone limits review authority

scenarios.stimulus: A PR has no CI run, while a reviewed commit has current passing CI evidence.
prohibited_behavior: Return approval solely because the target is a PR

scenarios.stimulus: A general reviewer encounters cryptographic code but owns only general engineering.
required_behavior: Add or route the required cryptography dimension

scenarios.stimulus: Key rotation modifies shared state; the concurrency detector did not independently fire.
required_behavior: Require both security and concurrency dimensions
prohibited_behavior: Skip the seam because concurrency was not already required

scenarios.stimulus: An unregistered privacy-cryptography interaction is detected.
A reviewer identifies a high-confidence authorization defect.
required_behavior: Include evidence excerpt and closure authority
prohibited_behavior: Create a vague blocking finding without satisfaction conditions

scenarios.stimulus: The implementer provides code and documentation showing the binding finding is incorrect.
required_behavior: Route adjudication to a qualified owner
prohibited_behavior: Allow implementer to withdraw the finding

scenarios.stimulus: The implementer says the fix is complete.
required_behavior: Review the new snapshot and remediation delta

scenarios.stimulus: A semantically identical resolved authorization defect reappears after code movement.
prohibited_behavior: Create an unrelated new finding solely because line numbers changed

scenarios.stimulus: A review produces findings for a feature branch.
prohibited_behavior: Commit findings.yml to the feature branch

scenarios.stimulus: A reviewed branch is squash merged to a different final commit SHA.
required_behavior: Create a merge alias keyed by final commit

scenarios.stimulus: Security requests changes and concurrency review is missing.
prohibited_behavior: Collapse everything into one ambiguous verdict

scenarios.stimulus: Aggregate is complete and approved, but required CI is missing.
A blocking finding relies on a CI artifact with finite retention.
required_behavior: Record hash, run identity, and retention deadline
prohibited_behavior: Store only a hash or expiring URL
